name: FlutterFlow No-Code Flutter App Builder API
what_it_does: Visual Flutter app builder with API integrations — enabling developers and non-technical users to build production-grade iOS and Android apps visually using Google's Flutter framework, with Firebase integration, custom code support, REST API connections, and exportable Flutter/Dart source code.
use_cases: Connecting FlutterFlow apps to external REST APIs for live data integration
Integrating Firebase Firestore, Auth, and Storage directly in FlutterFlow app builder
Exporting FlutterFlow-generated Flutter/Dart code for custom developer extension
Building and deploying production mobile apps visually without full Flutter knowledge
Creating white-label mobile apps rapidly for agency clients via FlutterFlow templates
not_for: Pure web applications without mobile need (use Webflow or Framer for web)
Enterprise backend-heavy apps (use OutSystems or Mendix for complex enterprise needs)
Serverless functions and backend logic (use Supabase or Firebase directly)
best_when: A developer or design-focused team wants to build production-quality Flutter mobile apps significantly faster by using a visual builder, while retaining the option to export and extend with real Dart code.
avoid_when: You need pure web apps, have zero Flutter/Dart knowledge for customization, or need complex state management beyond what a visual builder provides.

auth.notes: FlutterFlow API key for programmatic project management. Bearer token in Authorization header. REST API calls within apps configured in FlutterFlow builder (API Calls section). Firebase Auth for end-user authentication in built apps. No webhooks from FlutterFlow platform. GitHub integration for code export and CI/CD.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 1 project, FlutterFlow branding, limited features
pricing.notes: San Francisco-based company. Founded 2020. Raised $25M Series A (2022). Backed by General Catalyst, Y Combinator (W21). Google partnership — built on Google's Flutter framework. Firebase tight integration. GitHub export enables professional CI/CD. Used by 500K+ developers. Strong in agency market and startup MVPs. Growing as Flutter itself grows.

performance.rate_limits: Platform API rate limits not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Platform API for project management. REST API calls in app configured via builder UI. Good documentation for in-app API configuration. App Store publishing requires Apple Developer account ($99/year). Firebase config required for Firestore/Auth. GitHub export available for code-level customization.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Platform API reads idempotent. In-app API calls depend on external API behavior. Project operations may not be idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Firebase project required for most production features — separate setup and billing
Apple Developer Program ($99/year) + Google Play ($25 one-time) for app publishing
In-app API calls configured in FlutterFlow builder UI — not programmatically
Custom code requires Dart knowledge — reduces pure no-code advantage
FlutterFlow generates Flutter code — review exported code before production deployment

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US data residency. API key auth. Firebase security rules critical for production data protection — FlutterFlow does not configure these automatically. End-user auth via Firebase Auth. API keys in FlutterFlow app config — use environment variables for sensitive keys.
